name: testGetCurrentTestCaseTitle
title: testGetCurrentTestCaseTitle
description: Returns the name of the current test case. After your call of this function the name will be inside the character array testCaseTitle. The maximum length of the name is the length of the character array. This length will be saved in bufferSize.

parameters.name: testCaseTitle
parameters.description: This character array contains the answer after calling the function.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: This parameter saves the length of the character array.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
